previous_concepts: RivalRadar (competitor intelligence briefings) — retained for reference
US Market Sentiment API ($29/mo) — MVP LIVE: GET /api/sentiment, landing at reports/sentiment_api.html, Stripe wired

recommended_product.description: AI-powered daily pre-market intelligence briefing delivered by email before US market open (5:30am ET). Synthesizes overnight futures moves, unusual options activity, earnings calendar with whisper numbers, key technical levels, and breaking news sentiment into a single concise 3-minute read. Unlike raw data scanners ($100-150/mo) that require expertise and active screen time, PreMarket Pulse does the analysis FOR the trader — actionable narrative, not data dumps. Think 'Morning Brew meets Bloomberg Terminal, for $19/mo.'
recommended_product.target_market: US retail traders and part-time investors. ~60M+ active US brokerage accounts. Sweet spot: professionals with day jobs who swing trade or manage self-directed IRAs, part-time options traders, and self-taught investors who follow 10-50 tickers but lack time to monitor multiple platforms before market open.

features: Basic earnings calendar for the week ahead

competitors.name: Benzinga Pro

competitors.name: Yahoo Finance Morning Brief

competitors.name: TrendSpider

recommended_product.competitive_advantage: 1) MASSIVE PRICE GAP: Options intelligence tools cluster at $100-228/mo. We enter at $19/mo — 5-10x cheaper — by using AI agents to automate what paid analysts do manually, with zero marginal cost per subscriber. 2) FORMAT INNOVATION: Email-first, 3-minute read before coffee. Every competitor requires active screen time in complex dashboards. We serve the 'glance and go' use case that 90% of retail traders actually need. 3) AI SYNTHESIS: We don't dump raw data. Our agents synthesize unusual options flow + earnings + technicals + overnight news into a coherent narrative with specific actionable takeaways. No competitor at any price point delivers this combined synthesis as a daily email. 4) ORGANIC DISTRIBUTION: Daily Bluesky teaser posts (one free highlight per day) create a content-driven growth loop. Free content → email signup → paid conversion. 5) NEAR-ZERO OPEX: Our entire agent stack runs autonomously — web scraping, scheduling, AI synthesis, email delivery, Stripe billing. No human analysts, no editorial team. 70%+ profit margins from subscriber #1.
required_agents: Researcher — scrapes Barchart (free unusual options page), Yahoo Finance (earnings calendar, pre-market quotes), Finviz (sector performance, technical levels), SEC EDGAR (insider transactions)
Analyst — AI synthesis of all raw data into narrative briefing with actionable insights, trade ideas, risk/reward framing
EmailAgent — formatted HTML briefing delivery via SendGrid/email gateway to subscriber list
Scheduler — 5:00am ET daily cron: trigger scraping → analysis → email pipeline. Friday cron for weekly wrap
StripeAgent — checkout flow, subscription management, tier enforcement, trial periods
SocialAgent — daily Bluesky teaser posts with one compelling highlight from the briefing to drive organic signups
MetricsAgent — track subscriber growth, open rates, click rates, conversion funnels, churn, MRR
mvp_features: Daily pre-market email briefing generated by AI research agents scraping free data sources
Unusual options activity top 10 from Barchart free page
Earnings calendar with consensus estimates from Yahoo Finance
SPY / QQQ / IWM key overnight levels from futures data
Landing page with email signup capturing free tier leads
Daily Bluesky teaser post with one highlight from the briefing
Cron-scheduled generation at 5:00am ET, delivery at 5:30am ET
data_sources_for_mvp: Barchart free unusual options activity page (no API key needed)
Yahoo Finance earnings calendar + pre-market quotes (free)
Finviz screener for technical levels and sector performance (free)
SEC EDGAR for recent insider transactions (free, public API)
Google News / financial news RSS feeds for sentiment (free)

go_to_market.day_1: Build data scraping pipeline, email HTML template, Stripe checkout, simple landing page
go_to_market.week_1: Launch free tier on Bluesky with daily teaser posts. Start collecting email signups. Target: 100+ free subscribers
go_to_market.week_2: Enable paid Trader tier ($19/mo). Convert 5-10% of free users. Target: 5-10 paid
go_to_market.month_6_target: 5,000 free subscribers, 400+ paid, launch Pro tier. Target: $10K+ MRR

revenue_potential.rationale: 60M+ US brokerage accounts. Retail trading volumes remain elevated post-2020. Options trading by retail investors up 35% since 2020. Email newsletter model proven at scale (Morning Brew: 4M+ subs, The Hustle: acquired by HubSpot for reported $27M). Our price point ($19/mo) is impulse-buy territory for anyone with a brokerage account.

recommended_product.why_this_wins: PreMarket Pulse sits in a wide-open gap: too expensive for Yahoo Finance users, too cheap for Unusual Whales to worry about, and differentiated from Briefing.com by AI synthesis and modern email-first UX. The market is fragmented — no one owns the 'affordable daily AI market briefing' category. First-mover advantage in combining unusual options flow + earnings + technicals + news into a single $19/mo email product. Our multi-agent stack makes this operationally trivial to run at scale.

risks_and_mitigations.risk: Data source reliability (free scraping may break)
risks_and_mitigations.mitigation: Build redundant scrapers for each data type. Graduate to paid APIs (Polygon.io, Barchart OnDemand) as revenue grows
Clear disclaimers: 'informational only, not investment advice.' Report data and AI analysis, never make specific buy/sell recommendations with price targets
Use SendGrid with proper DKIM/SPF/DMARC. Warm up sending domain. Keep content quality high to avoid spam filters

risks_and_mitigations.risk: Competitor response (Briefing.com modernizes, Unusual Whales adds email tier)
risks_and_mitigations.mitigation: Speed advantage — we can ship and iterate daily. Build subscriber lock-in through personalized watchlists and historical analysis

additional_opportunity.product_name: FlowPulse — AI-Powered Options Flow Alerts API
additional_opportunity.description: REST API + multi-channel alert service for US equity options flow. Users set custom filters (ticker, min premium, trade type, DTE) and receive AI-annotated push alerts via webhook, email, Discord bot, or Telegram bot when matching unusual activity is detected. Unlike every competitor, FlowPulse PUSHES personalized alerts TO the user with AI explanation — no dashboard babysitting required.
additional_opportunity.relationship_to_premarket_pulse: Complementary product. PreMarket Pulse = daily pre-market briefing (passive, once/day). FlowPulse = real-time intraday custom alerts (active, throughout trading day). Same target audience, different use cases. Can bundle at discount.

pricing.features: 5 filters, email+webhook, 15-min delay, 50 alerts/day, AI summaries
25 filters, all channels, real-time, unlimited alerts, API (1K calls/day), daily AI summary
Unlimited filters, all channels, real-time, API (10K calls/day), white-label Discord bot, bulk export

key_competitors.gap: No API, no custom delivery, dashboard-only

additional_opportunity.unique_value: ONLY service combining: (1) custom per-user filters, (2) multi-channel push delivery, (3) AI analysis per alert — at 30-60% below competitor pricing
